justification: All 6 pass criteria met: sequential async calls (fraud before gateway), AC6 tested with spy asserting gateway NOT called on fraud detection, AC4/AC5 include original error via cause chain verified by identity check, AC3 preserves decline reason with fallback, all 6 ACs tested with mock services, and acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs explicitly.

observations.text: Call ordering verified via instrumented sequence array, not just assumption
AC6 explicitly tested with jest spy asserting gateway.charge not called
Error chaining verified by identity (toBe) rather than just checking message strings
AC3 includes fallback for missing decline reason — defensive coding
Dependency injection via parameters avoids side-effect imports, improving testability
12 tests for 6 ACs shows thorough coverage including edge cases
